skills.description: Model Kotlin persistence code correctly for Spring Data JPA and Hibernate. Covers entity design, identity and equality, uniqueness constraints, relationships, fetch plans, and common ORM (Object-Relational Mapping) traps  specific to Kotlin. Use when creating or reviewing JPA (Java Persistence API)  entities, diagnosing N+1 or LazyInitializationException, placing indexes and  uniqueness rules, or preventing Kotlin-specific bugs such as data class  entities and broken equals/hashCode.
intents: create JPA entities in Kotlin
design correct equals/hashCode for JPA entities
diagnose LazyInitializationException in Kotlin JPA
diagnose N+1 query problems in Spring Data JPA
place uniqueness constraints and indexes on JPA entities
review Kotlin persistence code for ORM anti-patterns

skills.description: Use when converting Java source files to idiomatic Kotlin, when user mentions "java to kotlin", "j2k", "convert java", "migrate java to kotlin", or when working with .java files that need to become .kt files. Handles framework-aware conversion for Spring, Lombok, Hibernate, Jackson, Micronaut, Quarkus, Dagger/Hilt, RxJava, JUnit, Guice, Retrofit, and Mockito.
intents: batch convert Java package to Kotlin
convert Java to Kotlin
convert Java with framework annotations to Kotlin
migrate Java files to idiomatic Kotlin
translate Java source code to Kotlin

skills.description: Migrate KMP projects from CocoaPods (kotlin("native.cocoapods")) to Swift Package Manager (swiftPMDependencies DSL) — replaces pod() with swiftPackage(), transforms cocoapods.* imports to swiftPMImport.*, and reconfigures the Xcode project.
intents: convert pod() declarations to swiftPackage() declarations
deintegrate CocoaPods from KMP project
migrate KMP project from CocoaPods to SwiftPM
reconfigure Xcode project for SwiftPM integration
replace cocoapods plugin with swiftPMDependencies
transform cocoapods.* imports to swiftPMImport.*

skills.description: Migrates Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) projects to Android Gradle Plugin 9.0+. Handles plugin replacement (com.android.kotlin.multiplatform.library), module splitting, DSL migration, and the new default project structure. Use when upgrading AGP, when build fails due to KMP+AGP incompatibility, or when the user mentions AGP 9.0, android multiplatform plugin, KMP migration, or com.android.kotlin.multiplatform.library.
intents: fix build failures from KMP+AGP incompatibility
migrate KMP project to AGP 9.0
migrate kapt to KSP or legacy-kapt
remove kotlin-android plugin for built-in Kotlin support
replace com.android.library with com.android.kotlin.multiplatform.library
restructure multi-platform KMP project for AGP 9.0
split monolithic composeApp into per-platform modules
update Gradle and AGP versions for KMP compatibility
